text: My ADHD brain is genuinely built for creative work. The hyperfocus is a superpower when pointed at the right thing. Still working on the admin part.
Raised my hourly rate for the first time. Said it out loud on a call. Didn't die. Huge.
New brand identity project just wrapped. Really happy with this one. Full case study on my site. #branding #graphicdesign #logodesign
East Austin mural walk with my roommates. Art is everywhere here if you look for it. 🎨 #eastaustin #austin
Learning Blender. Made a donut. It is not a good donut but it is my donut and I made it.
Portfolio hit 1k visitors this month. Mostly from one Instagram post. The internet is wild.
PSA: If you're a designer undercharging, raise your rates. The clients who leave over price were not the clients you wanted.
